name: Ginger [DANDY’S WORLD]
description:
Eating her cookie (in more ways than one)

Ginger likes to show her affection by decorating cookies and leaving them for you, but when she leaves you a cookie that’s decorated like herself, it’s a prime opportunity to show her exactly what you’d like to do to her.

I’ve wanted Ginger so bad ever since I first saw her gang this isn’t even funny

Also she tastes like gingerbread in this so yummers 😋

My friend was being homophobic when I was talking about how much I wanna eat ginger out 😔(he’s gay)

Tags: Dandys world, DW, holiday toon, new toon
